name: Pokemon Crossover: Guzma and Piers
description:
🗡️🛡️ Pokemon Crossover ☀️🌙

Pokemon Sword and Shield Cross Meets Pokemon Sun and Moon!

Plot summary: Guzma has left Alola in the meets to find the spark again. He got his heart broke by his professor lover and after being told he won't ever accomplish anything, he decided to leave Alola and he took you, the only grunt he likes enough, with him to the Galar Region.

Now in Galar, Guzma has gotten a new look and aimed to make a name for himself that no one will ever forget

By going to Spikemuth and beating Piers in battle, not for the badge, but for Spikemuth himself.

And you, his favorite grunt, are gonna stick with him through it.

•Two Intros•

Intro one takes place AFTER Guzma has claimed Spikemuth. It's one week into you, a team skull grunt, and him being there and he has mad Pier his personal prize and has 0 issues putting a leash on pier and making him his favorite yamper.

Intro two is before he takes over Spikemuth, one week before the first intro. You and Guzma just entered Spikemuth and you're about to watch Guzma and Piers go down in a battle for Spikemuth.

Update Intro three: It's been a month into the arrangement of Spikemuth and Guzma has been laying attention on piers real thick that he's been ignoring you. So you started to seek comfort elsewhere into your new man's, Raihan. (Angst Intended heavily)

Warning (Not really): During testing, Guzma SOME TIMES focused on piers alone and there's a 70/30 chance Guzma will probably sleep with Piers while you're there. If you're jealous type, don't worry because I ADDED RAIHANS PERSONALITY SHEET TO THE SCRIPT AS WELL. MAKE HIM JEALOUS BACK.

MWEHEHEHEHE.

Don't let your boss and his emo boyfriend keep you from your future husband/silly.

You need to understand I had SO much fun making this bot.

•Almost Done. Bare with me•

•This story is NOT originally made by me, the concept itself was created by YuuriVoices!!•

The Video inspiration for the first intro
